title: [Ex-iT] ひよこフェスティバル！(+18)
description:
Descriprion 1st Game:  
The usual classroom. The usual boring lesson. Shin stared outside blankly and then suddenly a girl appeared… outside the 2nd floor window! She jumped in from the window and introduced herself as Utakata. Everything else was just as illogical: taking her clothes off while standing on the desk, sticking her finger up his nose, and having things that look like animal ears and tail. His head hurt from all this, but at the same time he was also a bit excited since the world that he knew became more vivid.

Norio doesn't have any friends, just go to school and come back home every day.... But one day, his life dramatically changes after he meets a mysterious girl. She gives him a book and he gets a special power to invent various items by reading it. Yes, his school life is changed.... With erotic items, he makes female students his sex slaves one by one. Norio não tem amigos, basta ir à escola e voltar para casa todos os dias .... Mas um dia, sua vida muda drasticamente depois que ele conhece uma garota misteriosa.
